zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Lorraine於1119年出生在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒南希時，她的父親Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine44歲，母親Adelheid van Leuven30歲。她和Gottfried I. von Sponheim至少有1個兒子。她去世於1182年在德國海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀波斯朋海姆享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lorraine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

variants.name: Loring
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorrain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adrien, Alban, Andre, Desire, Fernande, Philippe, Pierre.
French: variant of   Lorraine  . This surname is also found in Britain. Compare   Laurain   and   Laurin  .
History: Pierre Lorrain dit Lachapelle from Angliers in Vienne, France, married Françoise Hulin in France c. 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Lorraine was born in 1119, in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, her father, Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine, was 44 and her mother, Adelheid van Leuven, was 30. She had at least 1 son with Gottfried I. von Sponheim. She died in 1182, in Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Lorraine est née en 1119, à Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Adelheid van Leuven, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Gottfried I. von Sponheim. Elle est décédée en 1182, à Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Lorraine 1119 in Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine 44 und ihre Mutter Adelheid van Leuven 30. Sie hatte mit Gottfried I. von Sponheim mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1182 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Lorraine è nata il nel 1119 nel Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Adelheid van Leuven, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Gottfried I. von Sponheim. Morì nel 1182, nel Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Lorraineが1119年にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルナンシで生まれた時，父Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraineは44歳，母Adelheid van Leuvenは30歳であった。彼女はGottfried I. von Sponheimとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1182年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズバド クレウズナチブルグスプオンヘイムで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Lorraine(이)가 1119년 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 난시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid van Leuven(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Gottfried I. von Sponheim(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1182년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 바드 크레우즈나치 버그스폰하임에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Lorraine nasceu em 1119, em Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid van Leuven, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Gottfried I. von Sponheim. Ela faleceu em 1182, em Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Lorraine родилась в 1119 г. в местности нанси, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Adelheid van Leuven, 30. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Gottfried I. von Sponheim. Она умерла в 1182 г. в местности бургспоним, бад креузнач, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde de Lorraine nació en 1119, en Nancy, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Simon Ier dit le Gros de Lorraine, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Adelheid van Leuven, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Gottfried I. von Sponheim. Murió en 1182, en Burgsponheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 63 años.
